homepage.heroSubline: H&N Roofs delivers reliable roofing solutions across Southern California. Get a free quote today!
homepage.aboutTitle: Decades of Roofing Excellence in Los Angeles
aboutText: H&N Roofs started with a simple goal: to provide Los Angeles homeowners with roofing they could depend on. Founded by two brothers after years working under other roofers, we decided to build a company that puts quality and integrity first. We understand the unique challenges of roofing in Southern California, from earthquake preparedness to weathering intense sun and Santa Ana winds.

Our approach is straightforward: honest assessments, clear communication, and meticulous craftsmanship. We don't cut corners. We use premium materials designed to withstand the harsh LA climate, and our team is trained to handle everything from historic Spanish Colonial Revivals to modern hillside homes. We treat every project, big or small, with the same level of dedication.

We're proud to be a part of the Los Angeles community. We source materials locally whenever possible, and we actively support local organizations. When you choose H&N Roofs, you're not just getting a new roof; you're investing in a local business that cares about its neighbors.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: We understand LA's unique roofing needs, from seismic considerations to sun exposure.

valueProps.title: Premium Materials
valueProps.description: We use only the highest-quality materials designed to last in the Southern California climate.

valueProps.title: Skilled Craftsmanship
valueProps.description: Our experienced team delivers meticulous workmanship on every project.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: We provide clear, upfront estimates with no hidden fees.

homepage.ctaSubline: Protect your home with a reliable roof. Contact H&N Roofs today.

services.name: Roof Replacement
services.shortDescription: Complete roof replacement services for homes and businesses throughout Los Angeles.
services.description:
Is your roof showing its age? Are you experiencing leaks or other issues? A complete roof replacement from H&N Roofs will provide lasting protection for your home. We handle every step of the process, from removing the old roof to installing a brand new, high-quality roofing system. We offer a wide variety of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and more, to match your home's style and budget. 

We start with a thorough inspection of your existing roof to assess its condition and identify any underlying problems. We then provide you with a detailed estimate outlining the scope of work and the materials to be used. Our team takes care to protect your property during the replacement process, and we always clean up thoroughly after the job is complete. With H&N Roofs, you can be confident that your new roof will provide years of reliable performance, even in the face of intense sun, Santa Ana winds, and seismic activity. We are experienced in the unique challenges of replacing roofs on older homes found throughout Los Angeles, from bungalows to Spanish-style houses.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection and assessment
Step 2: Material selection and detailed estimate
Step 3: Old roof removal and disposal
Step 4: New roof installation and final inspection

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof, as well as the type of materials being used. Most replacements take between 3-7 days.

faq.question: What types of roofing materials do you offer?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of roofing materials, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and more. Our team can help you choose the best option for your home and budget.

faq.question: Do you offer financing options?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer financing options to help make roof replacement more affordable. Contact us to learn more about our financing plans.

services.name: Roof Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert roof repair services to fix leaks, damage, and other roofing problems.
services.description:
Don't let a small leak turn into a major problem. H&N Roofs provides prompt and reliable roof repair services throughout Los Angeles. Whether you have a few missing shingles, a damaged flashing, or a major leak, we can quickly diagnose the problem and provide an effective solution. We understand the importance of addressing roof repairs quickly to prevent further damage to your home. 

Our experienced technicians are skilled in repairing all types of roofing systems, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and flat roofs. We use high-quality materials to ensure that our repairs are durable and long-lasting. We also offer emergency roof repair services for urgent situations. From patching up a leaky bungalow roof in Pasadena to fixing wind damage after Santa Anas in Santa Clarita, we've seen it all. We'll give you an honest assessment and a fair price.
process: Step 1: Detailed roof inspection to identify the source of the problem
Step 2: Provide a clear and concise repair estimate
Step 3: Perform the necessary repairs using high-quality materials
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the repair is effective
benefits: Prevents further damage to your home
Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How do I know if I need a roof repair?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a roof repair include leaks, missing shingles, damaged flashing, and water stains on your ceiling.

faq.question: How much does a roof repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of materials needed. We provide free estimates for all roof repairs.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency roof repair services?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer emergency roof repair services for urgent situations. Contact us anytime, day or night.

services.name: Roof Inspection
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive roof inspections to identify potential problems and ensure the longevity of your roof.
services.description:
Protect your investment with a professional roof inspection from H&N Roofs. Our comprehensive roof inspections can help you identify potential problems before they become major issues. We thoroughly inspect your roof for signs of damage, wear and tear, and other issues that could compromise its integrity. We understand the specific challenges that Los Angeles roofs face, from intense UV exposure to the risk of seismic activity. 

Our experienced inspectors will provide you with a detailed report outlining the condition of your roof and any recommended repairs or maintenance. A roof inspection is especially important before buying or selling a home. We'll check for common problems in LA housing stock, like cracked tiles on Spanish roofs or dry rot in older wood shingles. Regular inspections can also extend the life of your roof and save you money on costly replacements down the road.
process: Step 1: Schedule a convenient inspection time
Step 2: Thorough visual inspection of the entire roof
Step 3: Detailed report outlining the condition of the roof
Step 4: Recommendations for repairs or maintenance
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, or after any major weather event.

faq.question: What is included in a roof inspection?
faq.answer: Our roof inspections include a thorough visual inspection of the entire roof, including the shingles, flashing, gutters, and downspouts.

faq.question: How much does a roof inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof inspection depends on the size and complexity of the roof. Contact us for a free quote.

services.name: Gutter Services
services.shortDescription: Gutter installation, repair, and cleaning to protect your home from water damage.
services.description:
Properly functioning gutters are essential for protecting your home from water damage. H&N Roofs provides complete gutter services, including installation, repair, and cleaning. We understand the importance of keeping your gutters clean and free of debris to ensure that they can effectively channel water away from your home's foundation. We know that Los Angeles' infrequent but intense rainfalls can quickly overwhelm clogged gutters, leading to costly damage. 

We offer a variety of gutter styles and materials to match your home's architecture and budget. Our experienced technicians can quickly and efficiently install new gutters, repair damaged gutters, or clean existing gutters. We can also recommend gutter guards to help prevent clogs and reduce the need for frequent cleaning. From the Craftsman homes of Pasadena to the modern builds of Irvine, we'll make sure your gutters are doing their job.
process: Step 1: Gutter inspection and assessment
Step 2: Gutter cleaning, repair, or installation
Step 3: Downspout inspection and cleaning
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure proper function
benefits: Protects your home from water damage
Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: How often should I clean my gutters?
faq.answer: We recommend cleaning your gutters at least twice a year, or more often if you live in an area with a lot of trees.

faq.question: What are the benefits of gutter guards?
faq.answer: Gutter guards help prevent clogs and reduce the need for frequent cleaning.

faq.question: How much does gutter service cost?
faq.answer: The cost of gutter service depends on the type of service and the size of your home. Contact us for a free quote.

services.name: Skylight Services
services.shortDescription: Skylight installation and repair services to bring natural light into your home.
services.description:
Bring the beauty of natural light into your home with skylight services from H&N Roofs. We offer skylight installation and repair services to enhance the beauty and functionality of your home. We understand the importance of proper skylight installation to prevent leaks and ensure energy efficiency. In Los Angeles, skylights can be a great way to brighten up a room, but they also need to be properly sealed to withstand the intense sun and occasional rain. 

Our experienced technicians can help you choose the right skylight for your home and install it properly. We also offer skylight repair services to fix leaks, cracks, and other issues. Whether you're looking to add a new skylight to your Silver Lake bungalow or repair an existing one in your Hollywood Hills home, we've got you covered.
process: Step 1: Skylight selection and design
Step 2: Skylight installation or repair
Step 3: Proper sealing and weatherproofing
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure proper function
benefits: Brings natural light into your home
Enhances the beauty of your home

faq.question: What are the benefits of skylights?
faq.answer: Skylights bring natural light into your home, enhance its beauty, increase energy efficiency, and add value.

faq.question: How much does skylight service cost?
faq.answer: The cost of skylight service depends on the type of service and the size of your skylight. Contact us for a free quote.

faq.question: Are skylights prone to leaking?
faq.answer: When properly installed and maintained, skylights are not prone to leaking. We take extra care to ensure that our skylights are properly sealed and weatherproofed.

services.name: Emergency Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency roofing services for urgent repairs and storm damage.
services.description:
When disaster strikes, H&N Roofs is here to help with our 24/7 emergency roofing services. We understand that roofing emergencies can happen at any time, and we're ready to respond quickly to protect your home from further damage. Whether it's a fallen tree limb, a severe storm, or a sudden leak, we'll be there to provide immediate assistance. In a city like Los Angeles, with its earthquake risks and occasional flash floods, knowing you have a reliable emergency roofer is crucial. 

Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle any type of roofing emergency, from patching holes to tarping damaged areas. We'll assess the situation, provide a temporary solution to prevent further damage, and then develop a plan for permanent repairs. Don't wait until it's too late – contact H&N Roofs for fast and reliable emergency roofing services.
process: Step 1: Immediate response to your emergency call
Step 2: Rapid assessment of the damage
Step 3: Temporary repairs to prevent further damage
Step 4: Development of a plan for permanent repairs

faq.question: What constitutes a roofing emergency?
faq.answer: A roofing emergency is any situation that poses an immediate threat to your home, such as a major leak, a fallen tree limb, or severe storm damage.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to an emergency call?
faq.answer: We strive to respond to emergency calls as quickly as possible, typically within a few hours.

faq.question: What is the cost of emergency roofing services?
faq.answer: The cost of emergency roofing services depends on the extent of the damage and the type of repairs needed. We provide upfront pricing and will work with your insurance company to minimize your out-of-pocket expenses.

services.name: Commercial Roofing
services.shortDescription: Full-service commercial roofing solutions for businesses in Los Angeles.
services.description:
H&N Roofs provides comprehensive commercial roofing solutions for businesses throughout Los Angeles. We understand the unique needs of commercial properties and offer a wide range of services to keep your roof in top condition. From office buildings to retail stores to industrial facilities, we have the expertise and experience to handle any commercial roofing project. We know that a damaged roof can disrupt your business operations and lead to costly repairs. 

We offer roof repair, replacement, and maintenance services, as well as new roof construction. Our experienced team is skilled in working with a variety of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and single-ply membranes. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure that your commercial roof provides lasting protection for your business. We handle everything from the initial inspection to the final cleanup, minimizing disruption to your business.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection and assessment
Step 2: Material selection and detailed estimate
Step 3: Roof repairs, replacement, or new construction
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support
benefits: Extends the life of your roof

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing systems do you work with?
faq.answer: We work with a variety of commercial roofing systems, including flat roofs, metal roofs, and single-ply membranes.

faq.question: Do you offer roof maintenance programs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer roof maintenance programs to help keep your commercial roof in top condition.

faq.question: How much does commercial roofing service cost?
faq.answer: The cost of commercial roofing service depends on the type of service and the size of your building. Contact us for a free quote.

serviceAreas.content:
H&N Roofs is proud to offer comprehensive roofing services to the residents and businesses of Long Beach, California. Known for its beautiful coastline and diverse architecture, Long Beach presents unique roofing challenges and opportunities. We understand the specific needs of Long Beach homeowners, especially those with the iconic 1920s-40s Craftsman homes that characterize many neighborhoods.

Our team is experienced in working with various roofing materials and styles, ensuring that your roof not only protects your property but also complements the architectural heritage of Long Beach. We are committed to providing high-quality workmanship and exceptional customer service to the Long Beach community. We understand the warm, dry climate and the effects it can have on roofing materials, and we can help you choose the best solution for your home or business.
serviceAreas.localContext: Long Beach features a mix of historic Craftsman homes and modern developments, requiring a diverse range of roofing expertise to maintain its unique character.

serviceAreas.content:

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: H&N Roofs was fantastic! We had a leak in our roof after the recent rains, and they came out quickly to assess the damage. The repair was done efficiently and professionally, and the price was very reasonable. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: The team from H&N Roofs did a great job cleaning out our gutters. They were completely clogged with leaves and debris, and they cleared everything out quickly and efficiently. Our gutters are now flowing freely!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: We recently had H&N Roofs replace our entire roof, and we couldn't be happier with the results. The team was professional, courteous, and efficient. They did a fantastic job, and our new roof looks amazing! They even helped us choose the right shingles to match our 1920s Craftsman home in Pasadena.

reviews.name: Robert B.
reviews.text: I needed a reliable roof inspection before buying a house in Long Beach. H&N Roofs was thorough and professional. The inspector identified a few potential issues that I was able to address with the seller before closing. Worth every penny!

reviews.name: Susan P.
reviews.text: We had a leaky skylight in our kitchen, and H&N Roofs came out and fixed it quickly and efficiently. The technician was knowledgeable and professional, and the price was very fair. No more leaks!

reviews.name: Michael T.
reviews.text: H&N Roofs saved the day! A tree branch fell on our roof during a storm, and they were here within hours to tarp the damaged area. They were professional, courteous, and did an excellent job. Highly recommend their emergency services!
